title: [想知道何謂 MVC？]
content:
MVC又叫 Model-View-Controller  是一種Design pattern （設計模式）
主要由下列三種元素所構成：



Model:主要用於資料的存取，在此我會把他想成一個object


Controller:主要用於接收信號與觸發事件，在此我會把他想成一個 FSM（finite-state machine）。


View:主要用於UI介面設計，在此可以想成要呈現給使用者的介面


[補充]
那什麼是 object??
其實在C語言的規格書就寫到 object != object-oriented
前者的重點在於資料的表達方式，後者的重點在於"everything is object"
對於我而言，object就是point，畢竟指標可以指向記憶體位置或是function，本人更傾向於後者的表達方式
如果有讀者不曉得何謂FSM。不訪可以想成語法switch-case
下圖為FSM的狀態圖：

MVC的優點：

It supports an event model that preserves state over HTTP, which benefits line-of-business Web application development. The Web Forms-based application provides dozens of events that are supported in hundreds of server controls.
It works well for small teams of Web developers and designers who want to take advantage of the large number of components available for rapid application development.
Separation of application tasks (input logic, business logic, and UI logic), testability, and test-driven development (TDD)mark>. All core contracts in the MVC framework are interface-based and can be tested by using mock objects, which are simulated objects that imitate the behavior of actual objects in the application

title: function-point
content:
point functionone:表示為 指標*one: 就是這個指標所指向的記憶體空間的內容，也就是一個結構student * one ：one 這個指標指向一個 student 類型的結構1234567891011121314151617#include #include  struct student{  int age;  char name[10];}; int main(){  student lynn = {23, {'l', 'y', 'n', 'n', '\0'}};  student *one = &lynn;  printf("%d \n", (*one).age); //(*one).age可以改寫成one->age  printf("%s \n", (*one).name);  system("pause");  return 0;}

1234567891011121314151617181920212223#include #include #include  struct student{  int age;  char name[10];}; void new_one(student *one){  (*one).age = 1000 +(*one).age;  for(int i = 0; (*one).name[i] != '\0'; i++)    (*one).name[i] = toupper((*one).name[i]);}; int main(){  student lynn = {23, {'l', 'y', 'n', 'n', '\0'}};  new_one(&lynn);  printf("%d \n", lynn.age);  printf("%s \n", lynn.name);  system("pause");  return 0;}

title: Hello World
content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.
Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post"

More info: Writing
Run server1$ hexo server

More info: Server
Generate static files1$ hexo generate

More info: Generating
Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy
